data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design considerations for interactive elements based on target size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button sizes and spacing for improved usability.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying choices to reduce user decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and clear information hierarchy.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design aligned with user expectations from similar interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Familiar navigation patterns and UI components.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting cognitive load with chunking information.
data.technical_spec: Group related content and use bullet points for clarity.

data.title: Kohler's Law
data.description: Enhancing recognition through visually distinct elements.
data.technical_spec: Use of contrast and color to distinguish interface elements.
